title: Multiworld Inventories
description: Mod that adds Per World Inventory support
body: ## About Multiworld Inventories is a mod, designed as an add-on for [Multiworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/multiworld), that allows players to have seperate per world inventories. ## Usage Upon teleportation to a different dimension the Player inventory, along with Armor, will become seperate from the origin dimension. ## Config The mod provides a configuration file (`config/multiworld-inventories/config.yml`) Current options: `netherSharesInventory` - Group Nether inventory to share with the Overworld. `theendSharesInventory` - Group The End's inventory to share with the Overworld. ## Todo - Seperate: Health/Hunger, Enderchests, Experience - World Groups ## Requires Requires [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api), Fabric API, and Multiworld.
